# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: VPC with public/private subnets across multiple AZs, IGW, NAT Gateways, and route tables for microservices architecture (no VPC Flow Logs).

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
  PublicSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/24
  PublicSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
  PrivateAppSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.10.0/24
  PrivateAppSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.11.0/24
  PrivateDataSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.20.0/24
  PrivateDataSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.21.0/24
  EnableDnsHostnames:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Default: 'true'
  EnableDnsSupport:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Default: 'true'
  EnvironmentName:
    Type: String
    Default: startup
    Description: Used for tagging/name prefix

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: !Ref EnableDnsHostnames
      EnableDnsSupport: !Ref EnableDnsSupport
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-vpc'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-igw'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-public-az1'
        - Key: Network
          Value: public
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-public-az2'
        - Key: Network
          Value: public
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateAppSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-app-az1'
        - Key: Network
          Value: private
        - Key: Tier
          Value: app
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateAppSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-app-az2'
        - Key: Network
          Value: private
        - Key: Tier
          Value: app
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateDataSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-data-az1'
        - Key: Network
          Value: private
        - Key: Tier
          Value: data
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateDataSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-data-az2'
        - Key: Network
          Value: private
        - Key: Tier
          Value: data
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-rtb-public'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PublicDefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  NatEip1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-nat-eip-az1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  NatEip2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-nat-eip-az2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  NatGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEip1.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-natgw-az1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  NatGateway2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEip2.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-natgw-az2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateAppRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-rtb-private-app-az1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateAppRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-rtb-private-app-az2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateDataRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-rtb-private-data-az1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateDataRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-rtb-private-data-az2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateAppDefaultRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateAppRouteTable1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway1

  PrivateAppDefaultRoute2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateAppRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway2

  PrivateDataDefaultRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateDataRouteTable1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway1

  PrivateDataDefaultRoute2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateDataRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway2

  PrivateAppSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateAppRouteTable1

  PrivateAppSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateAppRouteTable2

  PrivateDataSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateDataRouteTable1

  PrivateDataSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateDataRouteTable2

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VpcId'

  PublicSubnetIds:
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PublicSubnet1, !Ref PublicSubnet2]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetIds'

  PrivateAppSubnetIds:
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PrivateAppSubnet1, !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateAppSubnetIds'

  PrivateDataSubnetIds:
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PrivateDataSubnet1, !Ref PrivateDataSubnet2]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateDataSubnetIds'

  InternetGatewayId:
    Value: !Ref InternetGateway
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InternetGatewayId'

  NatGatewayIds:
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref NatGateway1, !Ref NatGateway2]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NatGatewayIds'
